attributes.Sql Query:
/***  INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG = 'I'   PURE NET CHANGES   ***/ 
 
 SELECT
 NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 NIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 NIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 NIRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 NIRM.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
 NIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
 NIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 NIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 NIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 NIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
 NIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
 NIRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 NIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
 NIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
 NIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
 NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 NIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    ,
 NIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME                ,
 NIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 NIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            ,
 NIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
 NIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
 NIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          ,
 NIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ,
 NIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            ,
 NIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       ,
 NIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
 NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 NIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         ,
 NIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 NIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
 NIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
 NIRM.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
 NIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
 NIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
 NIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
 NIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 NIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ,
 NIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         ,
 NIRM.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 NIRM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 NIRM.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 NIRM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
 NIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         ,
 NIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    ,
 NIRM.GL_DT                         ,
 NIRM.BK_SS_CD                      ,
 NIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               ,
 NIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
 NIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
 NIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
 NIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
 NIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
 NIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
 NIRM.TRANSACTION_DT                ,
 NIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
 NIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    ,
 NIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      ,
 NIRM.SPLIT_PCT                     ,
 NIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE               ,
 NIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           ,
 NIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       ,
 'I' AS INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG,
 NIRM.DV_FMV_FLG,
 NIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 NIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,  /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 NIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,  /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 NIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /* KDOPPALA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
NIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /* KDOPPALA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
NIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME ,/*PNEELRAJ : ADDED AS PART OF ICPM Q1FY16*/
NIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
NIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT   /* added as part of CE-CHINA AUG-rel CDR */ 
   /*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
 ,NIRM.XCAT_FLG
 ,NIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,NIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 ,NIRM.ELA_FLG
 ,NIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 ,NIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added aspart of Mar 11th product subscription scope */
 ,NIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
 ,NIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT
 ,NIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,NIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,NIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,NIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,NIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NIRM
 WHERE NIRM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  > '$$LastExtractDate'  AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ'  , 'DRCT_AS_T')
